message:
feat(autograd, api): implement cat/stack/reshape/view/squeeze/unsqueeze with full backward pass

Autograd layer:
- Add TensorNodeOp::Cat and TensorNodeOp::Stack variants storing input
  IDs, dim, and per-input dimension sizes for gradient splitting
- Add TensorJoinOperationEvent for dispatch ledger recording
- Implement TensorTape::cat() and TensorTape::stack() forward passes
  with shape validation, dispatch delegation, and output node creation
- Add TensorTape::view() as semantic alias for reshape()
- Implement backward pass for Cat (split gradient along concatenation
  dimension using outer/inner stride decomposition) and Stack (slice
  gradient along stacked dimension)
- Update topological sort and dependency counting to handle multi-input
  Cat/Stack nodes
- Add 20+ unit tests covering forward/backward for cat (dim0, dim1,
  three inputs), stack (dim0, dim1), reshape, view, squeeze, unsqueeze,
  roundtrip compositions, and error cases

API layer:
- Expose tensor_cat, tensor_stack, tensor_reshape, tensor_view,
  tensor_squeeze, tensor_unsqueeze on FrankenTorchSession
- Add record_tensor_join_operation ledger method for dispatch evidence
- Add session-level integration tests for all six new operations
  including backward gradient verification

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
